subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-22 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: God will assist you. One of the great prophets of the Orient, one of the worthies of the East.... When man dedicates his life to a cause he must dedicate himself entirely
subcodes.subjects: @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @symbolism, @words vs deeds, @independent investigation of truth; reality
